== Notes for [[Item:Q105651|Q105651]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death): 10th Muharram 61 AH (12th October 680 AD)

Was he '''Muhammad ul-Asghar''' or '''Muhammad al-Awsat'''?

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muhammad_Al_Asgar_ibn_Ali

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Ali

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000013345428769

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
